tests.scenario: Sleepcast audio continues when screen locks
steps: Open Headspace and navigate to Sleep > Sleepcasts
Select The Garden and begin playback
Lock the device screen within 10 seconds of starting
tests.expected_result: Sleepcast audio continues without interruption at the same volume after the screen locks.

tests.scenario: Sleepcast audio continues when notification arrives
steps: Play a Sleepcast with Do Not Disturb disabled
Send a test notification to the device from another app while audio is playing
tests.expected_result: Sleepcast audio does not pause, stop, or decrease in volume when the notification arrives.

tests.scenario: Sleep timer stops audio at configured time with fade
steps: Start a Sleepcast and set the sleep timer to 5 minutes
Wait 5 minutes without interacting with the device
tests.expected_result: Audio begins fading at the 5-minute mark and is completely silent within 5 minutes 30 seconds; no abrupt cutoff.

tests.scenario: Sleep timer does not stop audio earlier than configured
steps: Set the sleep timer to 60 minutes
Monitor playback for 45 minutes without interaction
tests.expected_result: Audio is still playing at the 45-minute mark and has not stopped before the configured 60-minute timer expires.

tests.scenario: Downloaded Sleepcast plays in airplane mode
steps: Download a Sleepcast while connected to Wi-Fi
Enable airplane mode
Open the Sleepcast library and tap the downloaded Sleepcast
tests.expected_result: Sleepcast begins playing within 5 seconds and plays completely without buffering or a network error message.

tests.scenario: Downloaded sleep sounds play in airplane mode
steps: Download a sleep sound track while connected to Wi-Fi
Toggle airplane mode on
Navigate to Sleep > Sounds and select the downloaded track
tests.expected_result: Sleep sound plays in full without any network-required error or interruption.

tests.scenario: Streak preserved after simulated server outage
steps: Complete a meditation session while the backend is in a maintenance window (simulated by blocking the API endpoint)
Restore backend connectivity
Reopen the app and view the streak counter
tests.expected_result: Streak counter reflects the completed session and has not been reset or decremented.

tests.scenario: Support can restore streak after verified outage
steps: Identify a day on which a server incident occurred in the incident log
Submit a streak restoration request in-app referencing the incident date
Wait for support response within 5 business days and verify streak
tests.expected_result: Streak is restored to the value it had before the server incident within 5 business days.

tests.scenario: Short session variant is available for every course session
steps: Open any multi-day Headspace course
Open a session within the course
Look for a session-length selector or Short variant option
tests.expected_result: A session-length selector is present showing at minimum a 5-minute short option alongside the original length.

tests.scenario: Short variant plays a complete condensed meditation
steps: Select the 5-minute short variant of a course session
Play the session to completion
tests.expected_result: The session plays for approximately 5 minutes and contains a complete beginning, middle, and end without abrupt cutoff.

tests.scenario: Completed course is removed from primary recommendation
steps: Complete all sessions in the Basics 10-day course
Navigate to the home screen and observe the recommendation feed
tests.expected_result: The Basics 10-day course does not appear in the top recommended items on the home screen.

tests.scenario: Higher-level course is recommended after beginner completion
steps: Mark a beginner course as complete
Open the home screen recommendation section
tests.expected_result: At least one intermediate or advanced course appears in the recommendation feed on the home screen following course completion.

tests.scenario: Renewal notification sent 7 days before billing
steps: Note the subscription renewal date
Check notification inbox 7 days before the renewal date
tests.expected_result: A push notification is received stating the renewal date, the charge amount, and containing a link to subscription management.

tests.scenario: Renewal email sent 7 days before billing
steps: Note the subscription renewal date
Check the email address associated with the account 7 days before renewal
tests.expected_result: A renewal reminder email is received containing the renewal date, charge amount, and a link to manage the subscription.

tests.scenario: Cancel subscription within 3 taps from home screen
steps: From the home screen tap the profile or account icon
Tap Subscription in account settings
Look for and tap Cancel Subscription
tests.expected_result: A Cancel Subscription button is visible on screen within 3 taps of the home screen and initiates cancellation without redirecting to an external browser.

tests.scenario: Cancellation completes without external website visit
steps: Navigate to the cancellation screen within the app
Follow the in-app cancellation flow to completion
tests.expected_result: Subscription is cancelled entirely within the app with no step requiring the user to open a web browser or contact support.

tests.scenario: Audio continues after app is backgrounded on Android
steps: Start playing a guided meditation on an Android device
Press the home button to background the app
Wait 3 minutes then return to Headspace
tests.expected_result: Audio has been playing continuously during the 3-minute background period; the playback position has advanced by approximately 3 minutes.

tests.scenario: Background audio survives switching to messaging app
steps: Start a Headspace meditation session
Open a messaging app and send a message (approximately 2 minutes)
Return to Headspace
tests.expected_result: Meditation audio has continued playing uninterrupted during the time spent in the messaging app.

tests.scenario: Session history restored after device change
steps: Note the total session count and streak on the original device
Sign in to Headspace on a new Android device
Wait 2 minutes for sync to complete
tests.expected_result: The new device displays the same session count and streak value as the original device.

tests.scenario: Course progress restored after device change
steps: Complete 7 sessions of a 10-day course on the original device
Sign in to Headspace on a new device and navigate to the course
tests.expected_result: The course shows 7 of 10 sessions completed, matching the progress recorded on the original device.

tests.scenario: Mood check-in response influences first recommendation
steps: Open Headspace and complete the mood check-in reporting anxious
Observe the first item in the recommendation feed
tests.expected_result: The first recommended item is tagged with a label indicating it was recommended because of the anxious mood report.

tests.scenario: Different moods produce different top recommendations
steps: Complete mood check-in reporting tired on one session
On a subsequent session complete mood check-in reporting focused
Compare the top recommendation in each session
tests.expected_result: The top recommendation differs between the tired session and the focused session, showing that mood input affects content selection.

tests.scenario: New Sleepcasts visible in Sleep section monthly
steps: Open the Sleep tab
Navigate to a New or Recently Added section in the Sleepcast library
tests.expected_result: At least 2 Sleepcasts with a publication date within the current calendar month are visible in the New section.

tests.scenario: New Sleepcasts remain on home screen for 14 days
steps: Note the publication date of a newly released Sleepcast
Check the home screen on days 1, 7, and 14 after publication
tests.expected_result: The new Sleepcast is visible in a prominent position on the home screen on all three check days.

tests.scenario: Flagging a recommendation removes it for 30 days
steps: Identify a recommended session on the home screen
Tap the Not for me or dismiss option on the session
Check the recommendation feed daily for 30 days
tests.expected_result: The flagged session does not appear in the recommendation feed at any point during the 30-day period.

tests.scenario: Flagging confirmation is displayed instantly
steps: Tap Not for me on any recommended session
tests.expected_result: A confirmation message appears immediately acknowledging the feedback and stating the session has been removed from recommendations.

tests.scenario: Landscape layout renders on Android tablet
steps: Open Headspace on an Android tablet with a screen diagonal of at least 7 inches
Rotate the device to landscape orientation
Navigate to the meditation home screen
tests.expected_result: The UI renders in a two-column or side-by-side landscape layout without any portrait-only constraints, cropping, or overflow.

tests.scenario: Landscape layout supports playback controls
steps: Place a 7-inch+ Android tablet in landscape mode
Begin playing a Sleepcast
tests.expected_result: All playback controls including pause, timer, and volume are accessible and functional in the landscape layout without requiring portrait rotation.
